channel.title: The QUILL Cast
channel.description: A 54-episode, two-host audio course on QUILL, the free, screen-reader-first writing studio from Community Access. Liam and Jessica lead you from your very first launch to mastery of every feature family: the editor and keyboard, documents and formats, document rescue and OCR, the private speech suite, optional AI, the Accessible Vault, Story Studio, GLOW accessibility review, braille production, extensions, and the trust architecture underneath it all. Episode voices are generated with QUILL's own on-device Kokoro neural speech engine.
channel.itunes:author: Community Access / BITS
channel.itunes:subtitle: A complete audio course on the screen-reader-first writing studio
channel.itunes:summary: A 54-episode, two-host audio course on QUILL, the free, screen-reader-first writing studio from Community Access. Liam and Jessica lead you from your very first launch to mastery of every feature family: the editor and keyboard, documents and formats, document rescue and OCR, the private speech suite, optional AI, the Accessible Vault, Story Studio, GLOW accessibility review, braille production, extensions, and the trust architecture underneath it all. Episode voices are generated with QUILL's own on-device Kokoro neural speech engine.

item.title: 1: Welcome to QUILL
item.description: What QUILL is and who it is for: the three design promises, why free matters, and how to follow this course. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep01-welcome-to-quill.html

item.title: 2: Install and First Launch
item.description: The installer, self-voicing setup, the wizard, and feature profiles - why smaller menus win for screen reader users. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep02-install-and-first-launch.html

item.title: 3: Your First Document
item.description: Files in and out: new, open, save, recent files, cursor position memory, and the silent crash-recovery net. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep03-your-first-document.html

item.title: 4: The Main Window
item.description: The menu bar by intent, tabs, the status bar as narrator, the Spoken Echo, the dialog contract, and why nothing steals focus. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep04-the-main-window.html

item.title: 5: Notebooks and Versions
item.description: Workspace notebooks as a single-window project binder, version snapshots, sticky notes, and the file menu's Notebook submenu. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep05-notebooks-and-versions.html

item.title: 6: The Command Palette
item.description: Ctrl+Shift+P: reach any of hundreds of commands by typing a fragment. The palette as discovery tool and shortcut tutor. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep06-the-command-palette.html

item.title: 7: What QUILL Says
item.description: The verbosity system: profiles, Quiet and Meeting modes, status queries, anti-spam machinery, and the Why did QUILL say that? explainer. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep07-what-quill-says.html

item.title: 8: Moving Through Text
item.description: Navigation as a vocabulary: characters to headings, bookmarks, selection marks, Go To Line, Quick Nav and Browse Mode. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep08-moving-through-text.html

item.title: 9: The QUILL Key
item.description: The prefix system in full: why chords exist, a tour of what lives behind the QUILL key, Browse Mode, and how to adopt chords. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep09-the-quill-key.html

item.title: 10: Make the Keyboard Yours
item.description: The Keymap Editor: two-way search, Record Keys, conflict swaps, diagnostics with one-click Heal, and shareable keyboard packs. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep10-make-the-keyboard-yours.html

item.title: 11: Editing Power Tools
item.description: Selection and marks, the undo contract, line surgery, section moves, case transforms, and the classics: Repeat and Restore Deleted Text. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep11-editing-power-tools.html

item.title: 12: Power Tools Deep Dive
item.description: The Format submenus, the Insert menu's hidden muscle, Tools/Advanced, Work Personas, List Studio, and the editing lens switcher. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep12-power-tools-deep-dive.html

item.title: 13: Find, Replace, Navigate
item.description: Search with spoken match counts, replace-all as one undo step, a gentle first regular expression, and Search in Files. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep13-find-replace-navigate.html

item.title: 14: Compare and Differences
item.description: File-vs-file and document-vs-document compare, the F8 layer, difference list, and the original-untouched promise. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep14-compare-and-differences.html

item.title: 15: Spelling and Word Tools
item.description: Misspelling navigation (Ctrl+F7), the spell dialog, custom dictionaries, downloadable languages, and the dictionary and thesaurus. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep15-spelling-and-word-tools.html

item.title: 16: Languages and Thesaurus
item.description: Spell check languages, the AI Thesaurus, Markdown profile, citation style, inline notes, and language profiles for AI. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep16-languages-and-thesaurus.html

item.title: 17: Never Lose Work
item.description: The full safety stack: undo, autosave, crash recovery, backups, versions, snapshots, atomic writes, and honest failure reporting. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep17-never-lose-work.html

item.title: 18: Markdown and Structure
item.description: The structure language everything builds on: core syntax, why structure is audible, the live preview, and the style habits that pay off. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep18-markdown-and-structure.html

item.title: 19: The Text-Supply Toolkit
item.description: The twelve-slot Copy Tray, snippets with prompts and cursor markers, auto-expanding abbreviations, and recorded macros. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep19-the-text-supply-toolkit.html

item.title: 20: Snippet Gallery and Prompts
item.description: Placeholder grammar, smart triggers, the AI Library's three tabs, the snippet vs abbreviation distinction, and starter packs. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep20-snippet-gallery-and-prompts.html

item.title: 21: Read Aloud and Voices
item.description: Read Aloud across the six engines, the cloud voice option, the SSML Builder, the on-device languages, and voice casting. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep21-rich-formatting-hidden-codes.html

item.title: 22: Word, EPUB, PDF and Friends
item.description: Other people's formats with dignity: Word round-trips, the EPUB navigator, honest PDF extraction, and batch conversion. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep22-word-epub-pdf-and-friends.html

item.title: 23: Document Rescue and OCR
item.description: Free first, local first, nothing uploaded: MarkItDown for born-digital files, on-device Tesseract OCR, and the verified engine install. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep23-document-rescue-ocr.html

item.title: 24: OCR and Image Describe
item.description: Single-image OCR paths, clipboard and screen-capture entry, the image-describe flow, and the local speech model for offline captions. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep24-ocr-and-image-describe.html

item.title: 25: Files Everywhere
item.description: FTP, SFTP, WebDAV, and S3 from three commands; GitHub editing with no Git installed; SSH with strict host keys; Open from URL. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep25-files-everywhere.html

item.title: 26: Watch Folders and Automation
item.description: Teach QUILL to work while you're elsewhere: auto-opening inbox folders, watch actions and pipelines, and the safety posture. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep26-watch-folders-automation.html

item.title: 27: Publishing and Share
item.description: File/Publish submenu, Tools/Share submenu, the connection model, two feature flags, WordPress, and redaction of secrets. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep27-publishing-and-share.html

item.title: 28: Agents - Reviewable Autonomy
item.description: Plans you read before they run: the plan-review-execute contract, Accessibility Tune-Up as flagship, partial approval, and the craft of reviewing plans. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep28-read-aloud-and-voices.html

item.title: 29: Voice Catalog Walkthrough
item.description: The full voice catalog: SAPI unfiltered, Kokoro, Piper, eSpeak world, DECtalk, and the cloud voice. A voice for every job. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep29-voice-catalog-walkthrough.html

item.title: 30: Dictation
item.description: You talk, QUILL types, offline: Whisper-powered hold-to-talk and locked dictation, model choices, and the speak-fast-repair-fast workflow. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep30-dictation.html

item.title: 31: Voice and Conversation
item.description: Tools/Speech walked top to bottom, the curated allowlist of voice commands, Voice Command vs Voice Conversation Mode vs Hey QUILL wake word. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep31-voice-and-conversation.html

item.title: 32: Transcription and the Listening Companion
item.description: Recordings into documents, privately: local transcription, Transcript Actions from minutes to follow-up emails, and the no-syntax Action Builder. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep32-transcription-listening-companion.html

item.title: 33: The Audio Studio
item.description: Documents out to sound, all grown up: three journeys, incremental rebuilds, voice casting, AI chapter titles, publishing, and DAISY export. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep33-the-audio-studio.html

item.title: 34: Setting Up AI
item.description: Off by default, reviewable always, free for everyone: the wizard's honest choices and the privacy architecture underneath. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep34-setting-up-ai.html

item.title: 35: Ask Quill and Everyday AI
item.description: One conversation that knows your document, the quick-action toolkit, AI spell/grammar/thesaurus above the local engines, and custom instructions. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep35-ask-quill-everyday-ai.html

item.title: 36: The AI Library - Prompts and Skills
item.description: A build-along up the ladder: saving prompts, promoting to skills, sharing packs, and the promotion continuum. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep36-ai-library-prompts-and-skills.html

item.title: 37: The AI Toolkit
item.description: Proofread, Transform Selection, Translate, Read Aloud, Transcribe Audio, the More submenu, and the 16-agent Run Agent catalog. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep37-the-ai-toolkit.html

item.title: 38: Every-Day Writing Style
item.description: AI style customization: writing style, tone, custom instructions per session and globally, and how style propagates to all AI verbs. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep38-every-day-writing-style.html

item.title: 39: The AI Library - Prompts and Skills
item.description: A build-along up the ladder: saving your first prompt with variables, promoting it into a multi-step skill, and sharing packs. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep39-agents-reviewable-autonomy.html

item.title: 40: The Accessible Vault
item.description: Linked notes rebuilt for the ear: wikilinks, the spoken what links here, Note Neighborhood, unlinked mentions, and fearless rename. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep40-accessible-vault-basics.html

item.title: 41: Vault Power
item.description: Tags that roll up, templates with prompts, daily notes, embeds, exporting your vault as an accessible website, and Git sync. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep41-vault-power.html

item.title: 42: Story Studio
item.description: Book-length writing with a keyboard-first binder: structure from your headings, character and plot-thread detail forms as front matter, and compile-to-manuscript. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep42-story-studio.html

item.title: 43: Story Studio Practice
item.description: Hands-on build-along: a fresh folder, three Markdown files, a character with role/goal/motivation/arc, a place, a plot thread, and compile. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep43-story-studio-practice.html

item.title: 44: Story Studio + Vault + AIs
item.description: Composition: a Story Studio project paired with an Accessible Vault of worldbuilding, Ask Quill for manuscript-wide consistency, one source feeding every export. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep44-story-studio-vault-ai.html

item.title: 45: GLOW - Audit and Fix
item.description: Guided confidence: plain-language audits of the document in front of you, in-place selection fixes, and whole-document fixes with before/after compare. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep45-glow-audit-and-fix.html

item.title: 46: GLOW for Files
item.description: Scored, graded audits of Word, PowerPoint, Excel, PDF, and EPUB; non-destructive Fix File; and the signature-verified engine update path. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep46-glow-for-files.html

item.title: 47: Author Tools Mega
item.description: One manuscript, six finished artifacts: a guided walkthrough of GLOW audit, compile, Word, EPUB, PDF, DAISY, audiobook, and braille, in order. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep47-author-tools-mega.html

item.title: 48: The Bundled Quillins
item.description: A walkthrough of the bundled Quillins (word-count, table-studio, csv-studio, spell-check helpers, and the rest) and how each contributes. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep48-the-bundled-quillins.html

item.title: 49: Braille Production
item.description: BRF, BRL, PEF and UEB workflows; Read Layout Metrics and the longest-line repair loop; trailing-space cleanup; and the cell-two display workaround. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep49-braille-production.html

item.title: 50: Quillins and the Developer Console
item.description: The extension system: worker-process fault isolation, Python and JavaScript Quillins, the deliberately-gated marketplace, and the accessible scripting console. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep50-quillins-and-the-console.html

item.title: 51: Build Your Own Quillin
item.description: Build-along: a minimal Quillin in Python (and JavaScript), manifest.json, worker-process fault isolation, install path, and lint with quillin_lint. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep51-build-your-own-quillin.html

item.title: 52: Trust, Community, and the Road Ahead
item.description: The rules, the community and its receipts, the public roadmap, and what QUILL proves about designing screen-reader-first. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep52-trust-community-finale.html

item.title: 53: Accessibility Power User
item.description: The companion to the finale: the QuillRichEdit experimental lever, the full keyboard-pack tour, the verbosity deep-dive, and the dialog-cue gate. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep53-accessibility-power-user.html

item.title: 54: Power User Stability
item.description: The finale: HTML and Encoding, file recovery, Help menu diagnostics, redaction deep-dive, Profile Health Check, and the safety contract that holds it all up. Full transcript: https://community-access.github.io/quill/podcast/transcripts/ep54-power-user-stability.html
